title: Mob Eraser
description: Adds a creative only eraser item to easily erase annoying mobs!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb1007b6b65d50d32196a6302e1766e3977629dc.png)




Welcome to Mob Erasure!

This is a simple utility mod is intended for creative builders that need to easily remove any individual mobs without having to kill them. Simply punch a mob and it will be erased. Note this item will not work on other players.
This mod is for 1.16.5 to 1.20.1 Forge and should work with removing other modded entities!

There is also a secret mob that can be spawned in via commands!

Logo made using the Minecraft Title Generator Addon Ewan Howell
